biomes.label: Plains
biomes.description: Open meadow terrain with light vegetation and scattered stones.

biomes.label: Forest
biomes.description: Dense vegetation with richer greens, softer rock tones, and stronger canopy.

biomes.label: Mountain
biomes.description: Sharper elevation with sparse trees, stronger rock presence, and cooler materials.

treeVariants.label: Pine
treeVariants.description: Tall conifer silhouette suited for plains and foothills.

treeVariants.label: Oak
treeVariants.description: Rounded broadleaf canopy for fuller forest coverage.

treeVariants.label: Dead Tree
treeVariants.description: Dry branch-heavy tree profile for harsher mountain zones.

rockVariants.label: Pebble Cluster
rockVariants.description: Small rounded stone grouping for light scatter.

rockVariants.label: Mossy Rock
rockVariants.description: Rounded medium rock profile for damp forest floors.

rockVariants.label: Cliff Spire
rockVariants.description: Sharper stone form for mountain passes and steeper slopes.

fernVariants.label: Fan Fern
fernVariants.description: Wide frond spread for denser understory coverage.

fernVariants.label: Bush Fern
fernVariants.description: Short clustered foliage for alpine and shaded pockets.

fernVariants.label: Tuft Fern
fernVariants.description: Lightweight grass-fern hybrid for plains and edges.

materialPresets.label: Meadow
materialPresets.description: Bright grass, warm rock, and clear water for open fields.

materialPresets.label: Forest Floor
materialPresets.description: Darker vegetation and damp rock tones with deeper water.

materialPresets.label: Alpine Stone
materialPresets.description: Cooler gray rock palette with sparse grass and crisp water.
